name: Drunken Table Wars
description: The Drunken series continues with table wars. Try to draw the table to your area. Play single player mode or 2 player mode! To win, you should defeat your opponent 5 times. Objects falling on the table can affect the matches. Come on, hold the table!
instructions: W and UP ARROW or Touch Controls possible for mobile devices
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Balance, Fighting, Fun, Funny, Physics, War
